gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول أو ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/33)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول أو ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/33)
text: كُنَّا عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) جُلُوساً فَقَالَ لَنَا إِنَّ لِصَاحِبِ هَذَا الْأَمْرِ غَيْبَةً الْمُتَمَسِّكُ فِيهَا بِدِينِهِ كَالْخَارِطِ لِلْقَتَادِ ثُمَّ قَالَ هَكَذَا بِيَدِهِ فَأَيُّكُمْ يُمْسِكُ شَوْكَ الْقَتَادِ بِيَدِهِ ثُمَّ أَطْرَقَ مَلِيّاً ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّ لِصَاحِبِ هَذَا الْأَمْرِ غَيْبَةً فَلْيَتَّقِ اللَّهَ عَبْدٌ وَ لْيَتَمَسَّكْ بِدِينِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya and Al Hassan Bin Muhammad, altogether from Ja’far Bin Muhammad Al Kufy, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Al Sayrafi, from Salih Bin Khalid, from Yaman Al Tammar who said,

‘We were seated in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to us: ‘For the Master<sup>asws</sup> of this command there would be an Occultation. Being attached to his<sup>asws</sup> Religion would be like entering into the thorny bush’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Like this!’ – by his<sup>asws</sup> hand. So, which one of you would like to touch a branch of thorns?’ Then he<sup>asws</sup> was silent for a while, then said: ‘For the Master<sup>asws</sup> of this command there would be an Occultation, so let a servant fear Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and let him attach with his<sup>asws</sup> Religion’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya and al-Hassan ibn Muhammad both have narrated from Ja’far ibn Muhammad al-Kufi from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad al-Sayrafi from Salih ibn Khalid from Yaman al-Tammar who has said the following. “Once we were in the presence of abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) and he said to us, “The in charge of this task (Leadership with Divine Authority) will disappear from public sight. At that time following one’s religion would like wiping the thorns of cactus plant with one’s bare. The Imam (a.s.) made certain hand gestures. Who among you is ready to hold in his hands a branch of cactus? He then remained quite for a little while and then said, “The in charge of this task (Leadership with Divine Authority) will disappear from public sight. A servant (of Allah) must maintain piety before Him and hold fast to His religion,”
